name: CAM Surveying
description: Over 50 years combined experience in Central Kentucky, offering commercial, residential, lot, farm surveys, land title surveys, elevation certificates, and planning & zoning consulting.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: they absolutely exceeded my expectations and I couldn't recommend these guys more!
demonstrated above and beyond customer service
Very professional and quick. They accommodated the fact my wife and I work nights.

sentiment.summary: CAM Surveying receives overwhelmingly positive sentiment with reviewers praising their professionalism, exceptional customer service, and willingness to exceed expectations both in service delivery and customer support.

name: Cardinal Surveying
description: 35 years experience providing quality surveying including boundary surveys, site plans for residential and commercial, and topographic surveys, primarily in Jefferson, Oldham, Bullitt Counties.

name: Hester Precision Surveys
description: Licensed land surveyor in Kentucky and Tennessee with nearly 19 years experience, providing professional surveying and geomatics for commercial, industrial, residential, and rural properties.

name: Millman National Land Services
description: Nationwide full-service provider specializing in commercial land surveying across Kentucky, including boundary surveys, ALTA/NSPS Land Title Surveys, topographic mapping, and environmental assessments.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: They're friendly, with a can-do, will-do attitude. They're always trying to make sure we're a satisfied customer.
There is no confusion. They're available and enthusiastic about the work they do. That is peace of mind for us.
We were thoroughly impressed with Millman during the Burger King transaction and will be sure to keep Millman in mind for future transactions.

sentiment.summary: Millman National Land Services has overwhelmingly positive sentiment with reviewers consistently praising their friendly demeanor, can-do attitude, professionalism, and reliability across major transactions.
